---
title: "Highlights"
---

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%281%29.jpg" alt="Audience listening to a conference presentation at China PharmaRUG 2026" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%282%29.jpg" alt="Group photo of China PharmaRUG 2026 attendees" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%283%29.jpg" alt="Speaker presenting to attendees during a China PharmaRUG 2026 session" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%284%29.jpg" alt="Conference participants networking at China PharmaRUG 2026" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%285%29.jpg" alt="Meeting room view with presentation and attendees at China PharmaRUG 2026" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%286%29.jpg" alt="Attendees seated during a technical talk at China PharmaRUG 2026" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%287%29.jpg" alt="Speaker and audience interaction at a China PharmaRUG 2026 session" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%288%29.jpg" alt="Conference participants in the event space at China PharmaRUG 2026" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%289%29.jpg" alt="Attendees gathered during China PharmaRUG 2026 conference activities" width="100%">

<img src="resources/pictures/pic%20%2810%29.jpg" alt="Closing moments of the China PharmaRUG 2026 event with participants" width="100%">
